  "claims": [
    "Dr. Sally Ride became the first American woman in space in 1983.",
    "Dr. Sally Ride is recognized as the earliest space traveler to be part of the LGBTQ+ community.",
    "Dr. Sally Ride was selected as one of only 35 individuals from 8,000 applicants to be part of NASA Astronaut Group 8.",
    "Dr. Sally Ride is the youngest American astronaut to have traveled to space at the age of 32.",
    "Dr. Sally Ride encountered gender-biased media questions during her career, including inquiries about the impact of flight on her reproductive organs.",
